2c.name: N‐(1‐Benzylpiperidin‐4‐yl)‐4‐Phenylbutanamide Hydrochloride
2c.quote: N‐(1‐Benzylpiperidin‐4‐yl)‐4‐Phenylbutanamide Hydrochloride (2c) White solid (425 mg, yield 80%): mp 162°C–164°C

2d.name: N‐(1‐Benzylpiperidin‐4‐yl)‐2‐Propylpentanamide Hydrochloride
2d.quote: N‐(1‐Benzylpiperidin‐4‐yl)‐2‐Propylpentanamide Hydrochloride (2d) White solid (349 mg, yield 70%): mp 164°C–165°C
